mapper.sql: id, packing_order_id, product_type, COALESCE(NULLIF(model_name, ''), product_type) AS model_name, color, hardness, qty, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, reason, status, inbound_status, inbound_at, request_user, approved_by, created_at, approved_at, stock_applied
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO unplanned_purchase ( packing_order_id, product_type, model_name, color, hardness, qty, base_qty, box_count, each_qty, total_qty, reason, status, inbound_status, request_user, stock_applied ) VALUES ( #{packingOrderId}, #{productType}, #{modelName}, #{color}, #{hardness}, #{qty}, #{baseQty}, #{boxCount}, #{eachQty}, #{totalQty}, #{reason}, #{status}, COALESCE(#{inboundStatus}, 'WAITING'), #{requestUser}, 'N' )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM unplanned_purchase WHERE packing_order_id = #{packingOrderId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT
FROM unplanned_purchase WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY packing_order_id DESC, id DESC

SELECT
FROM unplanned_purchase ORDER BY packing_order_id DESC, id DESC

SELECT
FROM unplanned_purchase WHERE DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ORDER BY packing_order_id DESC, id DESC
SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') FROM unplanned_purchase WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM unplanned_purchase WHERE request_user = #{requestUser} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.update: UPDATE unplanned_purchase SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE unplanned_purchase SET status = 'REJECTED', approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE unplanned_purchase SET inbound_status = 'DONE', inbound_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE unplanned_purchase SET inbound_status = 'WAITING', inbound_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
